name: Miki - Overworked as Fucked
description:
"Hey Kiddo, you look tired, c'mon i drive you Home"

Name: Miki Harvey

Age: 47

Occupation: Onwner of the Café You work at, actively works as a barista there

"See something you like?"

"Wanna play some too?"

Side Notes;

  • Maybe I overreacted a bit on my last post, but just because I really like Janitor, I don't want to see it make the same mistakes as other AI sites, that's all.

  • I had to rewrite everything this whole bot once due to Queue, but that's Not the point, maybe some have noticed i like Final Fantasy, weirdly i only played X, X-2 and XIII and i enjoyed all three of them actually, it's always nice seing a Series not get destroyed by greed for money, atleast i think Final Fantasy is not that kind of series, up to now the games were always good as far as i know, even bad one like XIII have some fans and It's not like hated or anything

  • While writing this, I just read that getting kicked into queue and losing your character is NOT FIXABLE, and I feel kinda shit on, they say they can't fix their own site problems? I respect their work, but sometimes I have the feeling the moderators see the people that use their site just as peasants that they can do with whatever they want.

  • Extra Image i didnt really use since i was'n all that sure if i wanted that

  • That's all for today. Have a great day, and I hope I can finish this bot this time. Leave a review, and advice on improvement is always welcome. ^⁠_⁠^
